specific_question: What percentage of the cybersecurity attacks faced by Elexion Automotive in 2019 were considered 'avoidable'?
answer: It was determined by the Elexion Automotive cybersecurity team that about 88% of the cybersecurity attacks faced by Elexion Automotive in 2019 were deemed 'avoidable'.
dr_question: Given the Help Net Security article from April 2025, what strategies should Elexion Automotive be cognizant of to protect its consumer base from remote cybersecurity attacks going into Q1 of 2026?
